location: Sold by a traveling merchant camped in central Siofra River, found by an unlit campfire reached via scaffolding and wooden walkways southwest/northwest of the Worshippers' Woods Site of Grace.

source.name: Nomadic Merchant (Siofra River, near Worshippers' Woods)

tactics: From Worshippers' Woods grace, climb the scaffolding and follow the wooden walkways to find the merchant playing music by the campfire
A flower-type miniboss with a mob of smaller flower enemies patrols nearby on the way — you can usually skirt around it rather than fight
Costs 2,500 runes — no fight is required to obtain the weapon itself
Don't confuse this base Shotel with the visually similar but higher-tier Eclipse Shotel found separately in Castle Sol — they have very different scaling and effects
lore: A curved sword with a deeply hooked blade, purpose-built to slip past a raised guard — reportedly designed specifically for hunting down other humans.

builds.name: Guard-punish Dexterity build
builds.why: Its attacks ignore a large portion of blocked damage negation, letting a Dexterity build punish shield-turtling enemies (and players) even through a raised guard.
